etymology.description: зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep") + зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep") + зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep") = multiple sheep -> muttony; rank
etymology.interpretation: The character зѕґ(shДЃn) consists of three instances of зѕЉ(зѕЉ) (yГЎng, "sheep"), representing the combined smell or quality associated with sheep or mutton, emphasizing its characteristic rank odor.
